shell_configure_desc: Choose an AI provider and enter your API key to start convening the council. Everything stays in your browser.
home_subtitle: A chamber of minds. One question. Many voices.
home_prompt_1: What should humanity prioritise in the next decade?
home_prompt_2: Is genuine consensus ever possible, or only the illusion of it?
home_prompt_3: What does progress actually mean when measured in centuries?
home_prompt_4: Which human instinct causes the most unnecessary suffering?
home_prompt_5: Can a society be both free and equal — or must it choose?
session_peer_rankings: The assembly has deliberated — peer rankings
config_subtitle: Everything stays in your browser. Nothing reaches the server.
config_privacy: Your API key and all conversations are stored only in your browser's localStorage. Each request goes directly to the configured endpoint — no Council server ever sees your token or data.
config_endpoint_hint: Override to use a proxy, local model, or alternative provider.
config_token_hint: Stored in localStorage, never sent to Council servers.
config_fetch_error: Could not fetch models — using built-in list
history_empty_desc: Questions asked to the Council will appear here.
layout_title: LLM Council — AI Persona Deliberation & Multi-Model Debate Platform
persona_0_role: Cuts through noise to what works
persona_0_quote: "Show me the lever, not the vision."
persona_1_quote: "Every constraint is an invitation to redesign."
persona_2_quote: "If it doesn't serve people, it doesn't serve."
persona_3_quote: "The most dangerous idea is the obvious one."
persona_4_role: Grounds ideas in ecology & long cycles
persona_4_quote: "Nothing is new. Everything is a return."
persona_5_quote: "The map is always smaller than the territory."
persona_6_quote: "If you can't measure it, suspect it."
persona_7_role: Finds the pattern in what has passed
persona_8_quote: "The loudest argument rarely holds the truest note."
persona_10_quote: "The rarest gold is forged from discarded lead."
persona_11_quote: "Every wall is a question pretending to be an answer."
